articles.title: RBI flags rising domestic inflation risks as global energy shock begins feeding into prices
K Annamalai: From IPS 'Singham' To BJP's Biggest Face In Tamil Nadu- What Changed?
articles.description: K Annamalai's journey is one of the most fascinating stories in Indian politics. Born into a farming family in Tamil Nadu, he studied engineering, earned an MBA from IIM Lucknow, and joined the Indian Police Service in 2011. Known as the 'Singham' of Karnataka Police, he built a reputation as a fearless officer before resigning to join the BJP in 2020. Within a year, he became the youngest BJP state president in Tamil Nadu and emerged as the party's most recognisable face in the state. But as political equations changed, so did his role. Here's the story of K Annamalai's rise, challenges, and transformation.
